name: Greek Fish Baked in Grapevine Leaves
recipeIngredient: 5 medium Whole fish, cleaned (heads left on)
Anchovy fillets, rinsed and minced (3 anchovies)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and dry the fish.
2. In a bowl, mix olive oil, lemon juice, parsley, thyme, fennel, salt, and pepper.
3. Dip each fish in the mixture and marinate for at least 1 hour or up to 2 hours in the refrigerator.
4. Remove the fish from the marinade and drain excess liquid.
5. Mix minced anchovies with butter and spread evenly on the fish using a knife.
6. Wrap each fish tightly in grapevine leaves, ensuring the seam side is down.
7. Place the wrapped fish in an attractive baking-serving dish.
8. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 30 minutes.
9. Serve hot, garnished with lemon slices and fennel leaves.
